sample_description:
High Density Housing / Commercial - Addition / Alteration - Interior alterations to the 4th and 5th residential penthouse level floor of this five storey Multiple Dwelling building on this site. Penthouse elevator serving one dwelling  (unit #401) only between levels 4 & 5. 

Scope of work: 
- Remove the existing walls and floor slab between 4th-5th levels for elevator shaft
- Install new elevator hoist way and structural backing for elevator rails  
- Install CSA B-44 compliant private residence elevator 

Building Review Branch Notes:
- Original permit for construction: BU461948
- Schedule A, Arch B and Struct B submitted. 
- Building is newly constructed and no additional upgrade would be required as per 11.2.1.2.(3) and (9)
- Okay for BP only as per Kirat Kang on April 25, 2022 

***Review as per VBBL 2019***

Field Review - Addition / Alteration - 1102 Hornby ST
Interior alterations to add a lift to this existing dwelling unit PH4 on the 6th floor of this existing multiple dwelling building on this site.

Scope of work:
- Install of one lift to residential  elevator located on the level 5 balcony providing access to level 6 bedroom within a single dwelling unit, removal  and construct of existing parapet wall.  

Ok for Field Review per J. Zhang, Sept 5, 2025

Schedule B Architectural - Robert H. Lee - 604-420-2233, rob@maraach.com
Schedule B Structural - Min Park, P.Eng 

"Elevator to conform to CAN/CSA B44"
